design_note: The 10 m-class local/global windows intentionally cover a smaller physical footprint than the previous 30 m setup to emphasize finer-scale terrain and environmental context.
coordinate_assumption: Input sample x/y were taken from the previous dual-view patch index and treated as coordinates in the legacy 30 m raster CRS; row_10m/col_10m were newly computed from coordinates transformed to the 10 m reference CRS.
